description: In March 2018 I dive into a new adventure at THEOplayer. As Full Stack Developer I work on new services and tools to enhance the THEOplayer experience.
Together with this new opportunity I shift my focus away from the .NET platform and I dive deeper into the JavaScript world with a big focus on NodeJS, TypeScript, React and GraphQL.
In November 2015 I join Boondoggle, I get to start on a new team that builds out one of the largest projects within the company.

As part of a larger consortium we build out the frontend tier for Argenta Netherlands, a large bank in the Netherlands. In little a year we launch the first part of the transformation with a new personal banking web application. The next year we continue adding additional features and extra services to enhance the Argenta online banking experience.

In this large project most of my focus goes to integrating a collection of different back-ends and combine them into an easy to consume API for the frontend application powered by Sitecore and Angular.
I also become a Sitecore Professional Developer by obtaining my Sitecore Certification
In October 2012 I join SBB Accountants & Adviseurs. As a junior I get my first experience as a .NET developer.

I end up becoming the lead developer of the project in charge of rewriting the in-house invoicing system which is used to bill over 10 000 active customers on a monthly basis for various accounting services.
By the end of 2014, I am responsible for developing the part in charge of the direct debits and build a SEPA (Single Euro Payments Area) compliant direct debit system.
In April 2012 I get my first professional experience in the field thanks to a great internship at Carabas.
I get to work as a PHP developer to help and maintain the in-house Content Management System and e-mail marketing platform.
In Februari 2012 I get to work on an online platform for managing different organisations who support and aid in the education offered by the SKBL-school-community.
The platform, as graduation project together with 3 other students, uses technologies like ASP.NET MVC and Entity Framework
